title.zh: MLME 原语的交互方式：请求 / 确认 / 指示 / 响应

title.en: Finding and starting a network: SCAN, JOIN, SYNCH and START
title.zh: 发现与启动网络：扫描、加入、同步与启动

title.en: The connection lifecycle: AUTHENTICATE, ASSOCIATE, REASSOCIATE, DISASSOCIATE, DEAUTHENTICATE
title.zh: 连接生命周期：认证、关联、重关联、解除关联与解除认证

title.en: Power, protection and measurement primitives: POWERMGT, SETKEYS/DELETEKEYS/SETPROTECTION, and the radio-measurement model
title.zh: 功率、保护与测量原语：电源管理、密钥/保护设置与无线测量模型

title.en: The PLME-SAP and the MIB: GET/SET and the dot11 managed objects
title.zh: PLME-SAP 与 MIB：GET/SET 与 dot11 管理对象

title.en: Security counter alarms: the PN-exhaustion & PN-warning indications
title.zh: 安全计数器告警：PN 耗尽与 PN 预警指示原语

title.en: The diagnostic logbook: event request / report / log primitives (WNM event reporting)
title.zh: 诊断日志簿：事件请求/上报/记录原语（WNM 事件上报）

title.en: Tunnelling management frames in-band: the On-channel Tunnel (OCTunnel) primitives
title.zh: 带内隧道封装管理帧：同信道隧道（OCTunnel）原语

title.en: Training the pencil beam: the DMG beamforming primitives (SLS, SU/MU-MIMO, hybrid)
title.zh: 训练铅笔波束：DMG 波束成形原语（SLS、SU/MU-MIMO、混合）

title.en: Link forecasting and service advertisement: the Estimated-Throughput & Update primitives
title.zh: 链路预估与服务广告：吞吐量预估与 Update 原语

title.en: Waking from deep sleep & pulling frames back: the WUR-Discovery and CancelTX primitives
title.zh: 从深度休眠中发现网络与撤回待发帧：WUR 发现与 CancelTX 原语

title.en: Vehicular sensing & emergency broadcast: the NGV radio-environment and EBCS primitives
title.zh: 车载感知与紧急广播：NGV 无线环境测量与 EBCS 原语

title.zh: 定义与附录

title.zh: 读懂记号：比特、字段，以及数学与逻辑约定

title.zh: 定义与缩略语：为什么每个词都至关重要
